title: Lane 4 second-season route design
summary: Prepare one next chapter-grade Route v2 outing or route design proof without requiring station shell changes first.

execution_order.goal: Scope the next route-design step: proof-only design, existing-route deepening, or one small chapter-grade outing.
execution_order.why_now: The catalog guardrails are now strong enough to consider more route authorship.

execution_order.goal: Write the proof-only second-season route boundary report, adding focused test-only guards only if the proof finds a missing assertion.
execution_order.why_now: A plain catalog append after filed Source to Shore would desync route/map/journal behavior from the dedicated Source to Shore station board.

execution_order.goal: Review route design for save stability, station independence, and no hidden fourth beat.
execution_order.why_now: A new route direction must not smuggle in a broad planner.

completion_gate: The post-Source-to-Shore route boundary is proof-closed before any new playable route is appended.
Route ids, save behavior, support behavior, and filed identities remain stable.
No station shell, geometry, broad content pack, or planner UI is required.
guardrails: Do not add a fourth Source to Shore beat unless scout proves capacity first.
No save schema change without explicit blocker evidence.
Do not append a new playable route after filed Dune Catch in this packet; prove the boundary instead.

proof_points: Filed source-to-shore-dune-catch leaves no active field request, active outing, journal outing, route-marker target, or replay label.
Source to Shore remains exactly Source Shelter, Forest Release, and Dune Catch.
A future post-Source-to-Shore playable route needs an explicit station route-family boundary before a catalog append can be player-facing.

verification: npm test -- --run src/test/field-request-catalog.test.ts src/test/field-requests.test.ts src/test/field-request-controller.test.ts src/test/field-season-board.test.ts src/test/save-snapshots.test.ts
npm test -- --run src/test/field-request-catalog.test.ts src/test/field-requests.test.ts src/test/field-request-controller.test.ts src/test/field-season-board.test.ts src/test/save-snapshots.test.ts

post_packet_path: If clean, proceed to route replay and support depth.
If station capacity is needed, hand it to lane 1.
